bead.title: bench-pr-A.3: fizeau-harbor-runner Docker image + container invocation wrapper
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Harbor and its harbor_adapters import from repo Python; the current runner adds repo root to PYTHONPATH on the host (cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105). To eliminate host Python, Harbor must run inside a Docker image with its adapters baked in, called by the bash runner.

ROOT CAUSE
Host-side PYTHONPATH injection couples Harbor execution to a host Python environment matching the repo's deps.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add scripts/benchmark/harbor-runner/Dockerfile that installs Harbor + scripts/benchmark/harbor_adapters/ + their pinned Python deps. Tag the image fizeau-harbor-runner:<short-sha or 'dev'>.
- Add scripts/benchmark/harbor-runner/build.sh that builds the image deterministically.
- Add scripts/benchmark/task-executors/harbor shell script that reads task-spec.json on stdin, runs `docker run --rm --name fizeau-harbor-<cell-id> ... fizeau-harbor-runner ...` with mounts for the cell directory and any required artifact paths, and writes result.json to the cell directory.
- Pass through env needed by Harbor; never mount host site-packages.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not wire the bash runner's per-cell loop to call this task-executor — that's sibling A.4.
- Do not delete scripts/benchmark/harbor_adapters/*.py from repo root (still imported by Go runner until removal PR).
- Preserve every parent non-scope item.

AC
1. `scripts/benchmark/harbor-runner/build.sh` builds fizeau-harbor-runner image without contacting host Python.
2. `scripts/benchmark/task-executors/harbor` invoked with a fixture task-spec.json on stdin produces a well-formed result.json; covered by TestHarborTaskExecutorSmoke (Go test, gated on `docker` availability via t.Skip otherwise).
3. TestHarborRunnerImageNoHostPython asserts the Dockerfile does not COPY or bind-mount host Python site-packages and that build.sh uses only files under scripts/benchmark/harbor-runner/ and scripts/benchmark/harbor_adapters/.
4. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
bead.acceptance:
1. scripts/benchmark/harbor-runner/Dockerfile + build.sh build fizeau-harbor-runner image.
2. TestHarborTaskExecutorSmoke runs scripts/benchmark/task-executors/harbor end-to-end against the image with a fixture spec (skips if docker unavailable).
3. TestHarborRunnerImageNoHostPython asserts no host-Python site-packages usage in image build.
4. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
